meta.name: typescript-mcp-server
meta.title: Typescript Mcp Server Skill
meta.description: Instructions for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers using the TypeScript SDK Triggers on: **/*.ts, **/*.js, **/package.json

original_definition.skill_description: Instructions for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers using the TypeScript SDK Triggers on: **/*.ts, **/*.js, **/package.json

actions.name: Use `McpServer` class for high-level server implementation w
actions.description: Use `McpServer` class for high-level server implementation with automatic protocol handling

actions.name: Use zod for input/output schema validation: `npm install zod
actions.description: Use zod for input/output schema validation: `npm install zod@3`

actions.name: Use `registerTool()`, `registerResource()`, and `registerPro
actions.description: Use `registerTool()`, `registerResource()`, and `registerPrompt()` methods (recommended over older APIs)

actions.name: Define schemas using zod: `{ inputSchema: { param: z.string(
actions.description: Define schemas using zod: `{ inputSchema: { param: z.string() }, outputSchema: { result: z.string() } }`

actions.name: Create new transport instances per request to prevent reques
actions.description: Create new transport instances per request to prevent request ID collisions (stateless mode)

actions.name: Configure CORS headers and expose `Mcp-Session-Id` for brows
actions.description: Configure CORS headers and expose `Mcp-Session-Id` for browser-based clients

actions.name: Use `ResourceTemplate` for dynamic resources with URI parame
actions.description: Use `ResourceTemplate` for dynamic resources with URI parameters: `new ResourceTemplate('resource://{param}', { list: undefined })`

actions.name: Implement sampling with `server.server.createMessage()` to r
actions.description: Implement sampling with `server.server.createMessage()` to request LLM completions from clients

actions.name: Enable notification debouncing for bulk updates: `debouncedN
actions.description: Enable notification debouncing for bulk updates: `debouncedNotificationMethods: ['notifications/tools/list_changed']`

actions.name: Dynamic updates: call `.enable()`, `.disable()`, `.update()`
actions.description: Dynamic updates: call `.enable()`, `.disable()`, `.update()`, or `.remove()` on registered items to emit `listChanged` notifications

rules.description: Always provide `title` field for tools, resources, and prompts for better UI display

directives.description: Use `Server` class for low-level control with manual request handlers
Return both `content` (for display) and `structuredContent` (for structured data) from tools
For HTTP servers, use `StreamableHTTPServerTransport` with Express or similar frameworks
For local integrations, use `StdioServerTransport` for stdio-based communication
Use session management with `sessionIdGenerator` for stateful servers
Enable DNS rebinding protection for local servers: `enableDnsRebindingProtection: true`
Support completions for better UX using `completable()` wrapper from `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/completable.js`
Use `server.server.elicitInput()` to request additional user input during tool execution
Use `getDisplayName()` from `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/shared/metadataUtils.js` for UI display names
Keep tool implementations focused on single responsibilities
